name: Satori
when_to_use: 需要把固定尺寸的 React-like 元素树与 CSS 子集排成社交卡片、海报或 OG 图 SVG 时用它而非手写,因为原生在字体 shaping、自动换行、flex 几何和多语言排版上失败;非完整浏览器 CSS 或交互 DOM 渲染器。
why_valuable: AI 默认可写死简单 SVG,但做不到根据文本长度、字重、字体度量与 flex 约束稳定计算每个 glyph 和盒子的坐标;Satori 把这类布局计算闭环为可复现 SVG。
license_note: MPL-2.0 是文件级弱 copyleft;直接依赖通常不要求整个消费作品改为 MPL,但修改 Satori 自身文件时须保留对应义务。

data_in.note: element 精确吃 ReactNode 或 {type,props} 的 React-like 对象;不是 HTML 字符串。options 必须给固定像素 width/height 和至少一份可覆盖文本字符的字体 ArrayBuffer。

element.type: 受支持 HTML 标签名或纯函数组件

props.children?: string | number | element | element[] —— 默认无子节点
props.style?: Satori 支持的 CSS-in-JS 子集对象 —— 默认 {}
props.src?: string | ArrayBuffer —— img 时使用;无图片时省略
props.width?: number —— img 建议显式给;默认由布局计算
props.height?: number —— img 建议显式给;默认由布局计算

options.width: number —— 输出 SVG 像素宽,必须 > 0
options.height: number —— 输出 SVG 像素高,必须 > 0

fonts.name: string —— style.fontFamily 引用名
fonts.style: 'normal'|'italic' —— 本裁剪 schema 要求显式给

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接挂 DOM、无 L 级、无 carriers;输出是可显示、保存或继续栅格化的完整 SVG 字符串。
provides.outputs: 固定 width×height 的 <svg>…</svg> 字符串,文字默认转为 path 以保持字体外观

peer.note: 消费端可把 SVG 字符串放入 Blob/object URL 或专用预览容器;需要 PNG 时再接 SVG 栅格化步骤,不要把 Satori 当浏览器截图器。

boot.note: 保守默认字体 URL 已核对且为 WOFF;只覆盖 Inter Latin。中文、阿拉伯文等必须在 data.options.fonts 传入覆盖相应字符的字体,否则不能保证 shaping。

isolation.evidence: satori@0.28.2 is a headless-primitive: satori(element, options):Promise<string> returns an SVG string and never mounts to the DOM (exports are only default satori, init, and type-only Font/FontStyle/FontWeight/Locale/SatoriNode/SatoriOptions). No DOM, no global style/event/mutation surface; the emitted <svg> string can be placed anywhere including inside a shadow root -> fully shadow-compatible.

en.when_to_use: Use it to lay out a fixed-size React-like element tree and CSS subset as SVG for social cards, posters, or OG images instead of implementing it by hand, which fails at font shaping, automatic line wrapping, flex geometry, and multilingual typesetting. It is not a full browser CSS or interactive DOM renderer.
en.why_valuable: AI can hard-code simple SVG by default but cannot reliably calculate every glyph and box coordinate from text length, weight, font metrics, and flex constraints; Satori closes this layout computation into reproducible SVG.

data_in.note: element accepts exactly a ReactNode or React-like {type,props} object, not an HTML string. options must provide fixed pixel width/height and at least one font ArrayBuffer that covers the text characters.

element.type: Supported HTML tag name or plain function component

props.children?: string | number | element | element[] -- No children by default
props.style?: CSS-in-JS subset supported by Satori -- Default {}
props.src?: string | ArrayBuffer -- Used for img; omit when there is no image
props.width?: number -- Recommended explicitly for img; calculated by layout by default
props.height?: number -- Recommended explicitly for img; calculated by layout by default

options.width: number -- Output SVG width in pixels; must be > 0
options.height: number -- Output SVG height in pixels; must be > 0

fonts.name: string -- Name referenced by style.fontFamily
fonts.weight: 100|200|300|400|500|600|700|800|900 -- This focused schema requires it explicitly
fonts.style: 'normal'|'italic' -- This focused schema requires it explicitly
